tracks.meaning: the process of reproducing text or images on paper or other material using ink and a printing press or digital printer
to send data from a computer to a printer or to output text to a display or file
to press or impress something onto a surface, leaving a mark or pattern
a distinctive mark or impression left by a fingertip, footstep, or other body part, used for identification
published or written material in the form of books, newspapers, or magazines
a photographic image produced on paper or another medium from a negative or digital file
a pattern or design reproduced on fabric through a dyeing or stamping process
to produce a visible mark or impression as a result of pressure or contact
to make a permanent or official record of something in written form
